message:
Improve sync package test coverage (53.9% -> 56.1%)

Added comprehensive unit tests for:
- Pool management: AddMachine nil map, duplicate ID, invalid machine,
  GetMachine not found, GetMachineByName case-insensitive
- Pool persistence: Save/Load with custom base path, invalid JSON
- State management: Save with nil pool, queue/history trimming,
  AddToQueue/RemoveFromQueue with nil queue, AddToHistory nil history,
  RecentHistory nil/empty
- Connection pool: Release, ReleaseNonExistent, CloseAll, IsConnected
- CSV operations: LoadFromCSV with no file, empty file, invalid lines
- Machine validation: empty name, empty address, HostPort non-standard
- Address functions: NormalizeAddress IPv6, ParseAddress invalid port
- Throttler: ShouldSync, RecordSync, Reset, LastSyncTime, default interval
- Global throttler functions and DefaultAutoSyncConfig

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
